title: Senate Bill 1413, introduced by Senator Roger Niello (R-Fair Oaks), proposes to end the biannual clock changes and make Permanent Standard Time the year-round standard in Californi
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The push for Permanent Standard Time over Daylight Saving Time is supported by evidence suggesting that standard time aligns more closely with human circadian rhythms.
Standard time is associated with fewer health risks, such as heart attacks and sleep disturbances.
